title: Sales Manager Vacancy at L&T Realty Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at L&T Realty Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at L&T Realty Advisory Limited are looking for an experienced Sales Manager based out of Navi Mumbai. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About L&T Realty Advisory Limited:
L&T Realty Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with L&T Realty Advisory Limited!
